message:
feat: add shell completions and update CLI architecture

CLI Improvements:
- cli/commands/completions.rs: Enhanced shell completion generation
  supporting bash, zsh, fish, elvish, and PowerShell
- cli/mod.rs: Updated CLI module with completion subcommand
- main.rs: Main entry point refinements

Dependencies:
- Cargo.toml: Added unstable-ext feature for clap, resolved
  merge with upstream changes
- Cargo.lock: Updated lock file

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
